/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/apppomodoro_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/apppomodoro_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_pomodoro.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/pomodorotimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/apppomodoro_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/build/.rcc/qmlcache/apppomodoro_Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_apppomodoro_raw_qml_0.cpp.o CMakeFiles/apppomodoro.dir/build/.qt/rcc/qrc_apppomodoro_raw_res_0.cpp.o -o apppomodoro  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
